'''Pari' Notgoth''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] crimelord operating in [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector]]. For a time, Notgoth employed the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Milacass]]. However, around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], there was an attempt on Notgoth's life, and the plot was tracked to Milacass. Even though Milacass had been framed and was innocent, he decided to run away.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Notgoth was an occasional partner of fellow crimelord [[Marg Sonat]], who in turn was under the orders of [[Sard Nightbringer]]. Sonat wanted Nightbringer's place and conspired with Notgoth and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] criminal [[Morgotou]]. However, Sonat did not trust Morgotou and asked Notgoth to kill him.

Notgoth, as a part of Sonat's plan, impersonated a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representative during an auction where Nightbringer wanted to sell a power armor prototype. Notgoth could not buy the armor himself in the auction, being surpassed by [[Natja]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] bid. However, Sonat later tracked and killed Natja.

A team of independent smugglers found Morgotou's body and tracked it to Notgoth. Notgoth explained the smugglers Sonat's role in Natja's death, but Notgoth himself fought to death.
